tenantProjectPeriod.tyaImpact: prevents period-as-project regression and supports new project creation

hrSource.tyaImpact: prevents broken HR reads and maps hoja de ruta before real connection

usersRolesScopes.tyaImpact: prepares representatives, coordinators, franchise, client, finance, certification and shoppers

shoppersProtectedProfiles.tyaImpact: allows full shopper data only through protected access while public preview stays source-safe

visitsAssignments.tyaImpact: prevents duplicated assignments between platform and HR and keeps visits out of available once assigned

applicationsScheduling.tyaImpact: keeps postulation, scheduling, reprogramming, cancellation and shopper flow coherent

academyCoursesManuals.tyaImpact: prevents courses, manuals and role routes from being recreated manually after connection

certificationsCarryover.tyaImpact: preserves already presented certifications and avoids asking shoppers to repeat them

liquidationsPayments.tyaImpact: keeps June and later payment states controlled without executing real payments

notificationsOutbox.tyaImpact: prepares notifications without real send until Make/WhatsApp/Outlook gates are active

reviewQueueConflicts.tyaImpact: prevents silent overwrite of identity, assignment, certification and payment conflicts

auditEvents.tyaImpact: documents protected reads, role changes, payment changes, source imports and critical actions

integrationsGates.tyaImpact: prevents Make, Gemini, Storage, payment or HR writeback from being assumed live

brandingPwa.tyaImpact: keeps client branding configurable without locking the prototype to TyA

cxDataBackendSwitch.tyaImpact: ensures modules continue using CX.data while backend adapter changes behind facade
